welcomeBanner.title: Welcome to SITES.BD
welcomeBanner.subtitle: Claim a free subdomain on sites.bd, esite.top, or esite.in and point it anywhere you like — all from one dashboard.

connectionGuide.title: Connect your domain
connectionGuide.intro: Already own a domain elsewhere? Point it at SITES.BD in a couple of steps.

steps.title: Search & claim
steps.body: Use the domain search to register a free SITES.BD subdomain, or skip to step 2 with one you already own.

steps.title: Choose how to connect
steps.body: Switch your domain to our system nameservers, or keep your current DNS provider and add a CNAME / A record.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: We watch for the DNS change and mark the domain Verified automatically — usually within minutes.

connectionGuide.tip: Most setups finish in under 10 minutes. SSL is provisioned automatically once verification completes.

faq.a: Yes — SITES.BD subdomains under sites.bd, esite.top, and esite.in are free for personal and small-business use. There are no hidden renewal fees.

faq.q: How long does DNS verification take?
faq.a: Once you update your DNS, we re-check every few minutes. Most domains verify within 5–10 minutes, but propagation can occasionally take up to an hour.

faq.q: Can I use my own nameservers?
faq.a: Yes. Pick "Manual DNS" when you claim the domain and add the CNAME or A records we generate. You stay in control of your DNS provider.
Free SSL is provisioned automatically through Cloudflare as soon as your domain is verified. There is nothing to install or renew.

faq.q: How do hosting orders get fulfilled?
faq.a: After checkout you'll see your invoice and order under Invoices and Services. We provision hosting manually within a few hours and post credentials to the ticket attached to the order.

faq.q: Who do I contact if something breaks?
faq.a: Open a support ticket from the Tickets page or message us on WhatsApp from any service detail screen. We answer the same day, every day.
